description:
Chie-sensei gets a call that Mobuo has suddenly gone missing. Is it related to the mysterious voice she heard?
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Reversed Isn`t Scary / The Sandbox Isn`t Scary / Nice People Aren`t Scary?
Sakasama wa Kowakunai / Osunaba wa Kowakunai / Yasashii Hito wa Kowakunai?
逆さまはコワくない / お砂場はコワくない / 優しい人はコワくない?
